title: Spring Sweet Vietnamese Vialone Nano Pilaf
description: This Vietnamese dish features vialone nano rice, infused with the flavors of spring and the essence of wok hei, making it a perfect shojin friendly meal for any time of day.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large wok or skillet over medium high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the rinsed vialone nano rice to the wok or skillet and stir to combine with the onion and mushroom mixture.
Add the soy sauce and sesame oil to the rice mixture and stir to combine.
Cook the rice mixture for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until it is heated through and starting to brown.
Season the rice mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the rice mixture to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
Serve the Spring Sweet Vietnamese Vialone Nano Pilaf hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
